title: LoopScheduler with HBR-SWARM-002 loop counter cap (25 iterations / 24h) and pending-review gating
goal: Land the LoopScheduler that orchestrates iteration cadence under HBR-SWARM-002 hard caps: at most 25 iterations per rolling 24-hour window per loop instance. Scheduler refuses to start a new iteration when (a) cap reached, (b) Goodhart pause active, (c) operator manual pause active, or (d) a pending promotion review blocks the prior iteration. Emits FR-EVT-DISTILL-LOOP-CAP per AC-DISTILL-LOOP-SAFEGUARDS when the cap rejects a start request.
expected_diff_shape: New module src/backend/handshake_core/src/self_improve/scheduler.rs (LoopScheduler + ScheduleDecision + IterationBudget + SchedulerReceipt types). Tests src/backend/handshake_core/tests/loop_scheduler_tests.rs.
implementation_notes: Per AC-DISTILL-LOOP-SAFEGUARDS: 'HBR-SWARM-002 loop counter cap with FR-EVT-DISTILL-LOOP-CAP receipt'. Per HBR-SWARM-002 the cap value is 25 iterations / 24h rolling window (operator-tunable but defaults to 25). Surface: `pub struct LoopScheduler<'a> { core: &'a LoopCore, sentinel: &'a GoodhartSentinel, gate: &'a LoopPromotionGate, ipc_state: &'a LoopIpcState, flight_recorder: &'a dyn FemsFlightRecorder, budget: IterationBudget }`. IterationBudget: `{ max_iterations_per_24h: u32 (default 25), rolling_window_seconds: u64 (default 86400) }`. Scheduler API: `pub fn try_schedule_next(history: &SchedulerHistory) -> ScheduleDecision`. ScheduleDecision: `{ Schedule, Skip { reason: SkipReason } }`. SkipReason enum: `BudgetExhausted { count_in_window, cap, window_started_at_utc }`, `GoodhartPause { receipt: SentinelReceipt }`, `OperatorPause { reason: String }`, `PendingPromotionReview { iteration_id, ticket_id }`. On BudgetExhausted, emit FR-EVT-DISTILL-LOOP-CAP with { count_in_window, cap, window_started_at_utc, next_eligible_at_utc }. Scheduler is the ONLY caller of `LoopCore::run_one_iteration`. Driver pattern: caller invokes try_schedule_next every N seconds; if Schedule, calls run_one_iteration and records result in history; if Skip, records the skip with reason and waits. Tests: budget enforcement (26th call in 24h returns Skip BudgetExhausted); rolling window shifts correctly (oldest iteration falls out after 24h); Goodhart pause blocks scheduling until unpause; operator pause blocks; pending promotion review for prior iteration blocks; FR-EVT-DISTILL-LOOP-CAP emitted exactly once per cap-skip; scheduler is deterministic given fixed clock injection.
risk_if_missed: Without the scheduler the loop can run unbounded, HBR-SWARM-002 is violated, and pause receipts are advisory rather than enforced.
validator_focus: Scheduler is the sole caller of run_one_iteration. Budget uses a true rolling window not a fixed daily reset. Every skip reason is typed.

minimum_controls: Scheduler is the only caller of run_one_iteration; no out-of-band iteration triggers.
Budget rolling window uses true 24h slide so cap cannot be evaded by burst+wait patterns.
FR-EVT-DISTILL-LOOP-CAP emitted on every cap-skip so audit reconstruction is complete.
